title: pachylophus marginatus
intro:
Pachylophus marginatus, also known as the "round-leafed pachylophus," is a species of plant in the family Asteraceae, native to the tropical regions of Africa.

This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it effective in treating various health issues.

The health benefits of Pachylophus marginatus include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. It can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
